resources.string: Cannot save contact when Airplane mode is on.
Cannot save contact when FDN Enabled.
Delete the label(s) will affect all additional numbers which are linked to the label(s). Are you sure?
The label name is invalid. Please input another one.
There\'s no space for new labels.
License details for open source software
Account sync is off. Tap to turn on.
Switch to editing the selected contact? Information you entered so far will be copied.
Modify the label will affect all additional numbers which are linked to the label.Are you sure?
Auto-sync is off. Tap to turn on.
The contacts to be deleted have details from multiple accounts. Details from read-only accounts will be hidden, not deleted.
Contacts from your read-only accounts cannot be deleted, but they can be hidden.
SIM contacts can not be merged.
Choose the contact you want to link with %s:
Caching vCard(s) to local temporary storage. The actual import will start soon.
Can\'t make outgoing calls while call barring is on.
Call ended because cellular data was disabled.
Call ended because the cellular data limit has been reached.
Video call changed to SS request
Video call changed to USSD request
Emergency calls restricted by access control.
Normal calls restricted by access control.
Outgoing calls are restricted by FDN.
All available lines are in use. To make a call, disconnect one of the calls on this device, or on one of your other devices.
Cannot make video calls when TTY is enabled.
Type a note to send with call…
Cannot save contact whose number is empty.
You\'ll clear the frequently contacted list in the Contacts and Phone apps, and force email apps to learn your addressing preferences from scratch.
The vCard composer didn\'t start properly.
Your contact list will be exported to file: %s.
Contacts deletion is running, cannot perform the operation.
Choose a default account for new contacts:
New contacts will be saved to %1$s.
Take a minute to add an account that will back up your contacts to Google.
recent call. %1$s. %2$s. %3$s. click to call back
Delete the label \"%1$s\"? (Contacts themselves will not be deleted.)
Removing \"%s\" from sync will also remove any ungrouped contacts from sync.
Contact info from %s is not editable
The %1$s is not able to store contact
Failed to import some contacts\' Email addresses because the storage for Email is full.\nCompleted: %d\nIncompleted: %d
Failed to save Email address because the storage for Email is full.
Finished exporting contacts, click the notification to share contacts.
Not enough memory. The file may be too large.
Some contacts do not have emails.
Some contacts do not have phone numbers.
Keep your contacts organized and useful
Cannot save same type number twice, please check it.
Phone book is not available now, please try later.
Couldn\'t import contacts from SIM card
Would you like to save the changes you already made and link with the contact selected?
No app was found to handle this action.
You have disabled a required permission.
Loading SIM contacts in the background, please wait for a moment.
Selected contacts can\'t be more than %d
Deleting this contact will delete details from multiple accounts.
There are no contacts to share.
Failure caused by SIM storage full\nCompleted: %d\nIncompleted: %d
Failure caused by SIM not ready\nCompleted: %d\nIncompleted: %d
Phone book is busy now, please try later.
No pictures are available on the device.
No app was found to handle this action.
Click to return to previous screen
Read-only accounts in this contact will be hidden, not deleted.
This contact is read-only. It can\'t be deleted, but you can hide it.
Searching for vCard data on SD card…
Cannot share the file with SMS, please use MMS.
Contact already exists in your list
No contacts on your SIM card
Cannot save contact when card is invalid.
Unlink this contact into multiple contacts?
Would you like to save the changes you already made and unlink this contact into multiple contacts?
These contacts might be the same person. You can link them together as a single contact.
Type contact name before linking with another.
Changes you make to all apps and accounts, not just Google Contacts, will be kept up to date between the web and your devices.
No more new labels can be added to the storage.
Label name too long for the storage.
vCard export request was rejected. Try again later.
vCard import request was rejected. Try again later.
The file will be imported shortly.
Please insert a SIM card or SD card to import/export contacts.
